docket_entries.description: COPY OF SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER RECEIVED AND FILED FROM PLFT VIVEK GUPTA. COPY OF THE SAME AND "ANSWER" MAILED TO DEFT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM ALAN SILVERMAN; CLERK: D. RAYRAY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2007. PLAINTIFF PRESENT DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED PRESENT. BY JUDGE PRO TEM ALAN SILVERMAN. CLERK: F. RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506)
ORDER (SC-108A) DATED JUNE 16, 2008. REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS "DENIED". COPY OF THE SAME MAILED TO PARTIES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-15-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEATHERCARE CLEANERS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUPTA, VIVEK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEATHERCARE CLEANERS $50.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $110.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF MAY NOT RECOVER FOR DAMAGE TO JACKET BECAUSE HE SIGNED A FULL RELEASE OF DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
